---
title: "Query Garden R Wrapper Example"
author: "Nakul R. Padalkar"
format: html
filters:
  - query-garden
query-garden:
  databases:
    - name: hr
      sql-file-path: "hr.sql"
---

## Generated From R

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| output: asis
source("../_extensions/query-garden/resources/r/querygarden.R")

query_garden_emit_sql_block(
  "select * from regions;",
  db = "hr",
  dialect = "postgresql"
)
```

## Generated From A SQL File

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| output: asis
query_garden_emit_sql_block_from_file(
  "sample-query.sql",
  db = "hr",
  dialect = "mysql"
)
```
